scope.target: Create a repeatable AI context self-audit skill and persist the current audit report.
scope.dependency_radius: Canonical skill registry, runtime wrapper indexes, dev-workflow capability profile, guide index, and root skill routing.
constraints: Default audit scope excludes src, tests, and other product-code roots.
Source-code review requests must be handed off to code-reviewer.
The auditor is read-only by default and must not remediate findings unless separately authorized.
Runtime wrappers stay thin and point to canonical instructions.

inputs.architecture_target: Canonical AI context audit capability with durable report output.
review_findings: The 2026-07-10 baseline and skill-based AI context audit results from this thread.
user_constraints: Make AI context self-auditing a recurring standard workflow.
Create a report template and save the current report.
Skip src and tests by default.
Route code-project scans to the code review skill.

steps: Synchronize wrappers, registries, routing, and guide entries.
deferred_items: Remediation of audit findings is a separate workflow.

results.summary: Created a recurring read-only AI context audit skill with explicit product-code exclusions, code-review handoff, two-pass comparison, durable report template, runtime routing, and the initial saved report.
tests_run: canonical/Codex/Claude wrapper parity: 13/13/13 with zero differences
planning and code-review-handoff forward tests: passed
initial automated git stage and commit: blocked because sandbox escalation was rejected after the approval reviewer reached its usage limit
manual commit: 3a11df7 was created and pushed to origin/main by the user
